subject: A figure in a white dress arched backward, a tree growing upward from where her head would be, suspended in an amber-lit gothic cityscape
description: A figure in a flowing white dress is arched dramatically backward, suspended mid-air or falling, with long hair trailing downward. Where the figure's head should be, a full tree grows upward, roots trailing down from the neck, branches spreading above. The scene is bathed in warm amber and sepia tones. Gothic spires and domed architecture form the background cityscape. A white bird is visible in the sky above. The image suggests death transformed into new growth — a body becoming a vessel for a plant. The mood is simultaneously elegant and eerie.
foreground: arched figure in white dress with tree growing from neck, roots trailing
background: gothic cityscape with spires and domes, warm amber sky
